pageDescription: Review and approve driver and storage owner verifications

list.emptyDescription: Try adjusting your search or filters.

confirm.approveDescription: Are you sure you want to approve verification for {{name}}?
confirm.rejectDescription: Are you sure you want to reject verification for {{name}}?
confirm.note: This action will update the verification status immediately.

rejectError: Failed to reject verification. Please try again.

details.title: Verification documents
details.description: Review uploaded documents and decide whether to approve or reject this verification request.
details.modalDescription: Only supported file types are previewed in this modal.
details.unsupportedType: This file type is not supported for preview. Only image and PDF files are allowed.
details.pdfPreviewLabel: PDF document preview is available in the modal.
details.noDocumentsDescription: There are no uploaded files for this verification yet.
details.nationalIdExpiryRequired: National ID expiry date and time (required on approve)
details.licenseExpiryRequired: License expiry date and time (required on approve)
details.expiryRequiredError: This field is required when approving verification.
details.notesPlaceholder: Add internal notes for this verification…
details.loadErrorDescription: Please try again or refresh the page.
